belier.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazes at 6 degrees Leo, igniting a fire triangle with your own Aries nature - this is the sky speaking your native language, loud and unambiguous. With no planets in retrograde, every intention you set today moves forward without the usual cosmic friction. The Sun's steady footing in early Taurus reminds you, though, that fire without root burns itself out: pace the flame.
belier.love: Leo's Moon stirs the performer in you, and you may find yourself drawn to grand gestures rather than quiet honesty - choose the gesture that costs you something real. A partner or potential connection responds not to spectacle today but to the warmth behind it. Let your confidence be an open door, not a trophy case.
belier.work: The square tension of the First Quarter Moon is a productive itch, pushing unfinished projects toward a decisive turn. Mars ruling your chart, with no retrograde drag slowing it down, gives you rare straight-line momentum - use it on the task you have been circling rather than starting something shiny and new. The Sun in Taurus rewards whoever builds today, not whoever merely plans.
belier.energy: Your physical vitality runs high, almost restless, under this Leo Moon - your body wants to move, to assert, to occupy space. Channel that surplus into something deliberate before midday, or it may spill into impatience by evening.
belier.intuition: Heraclitus wrote that the soul has its own logos, a depth you cannot reach by force. Today your instincts arrive not as whispers but as sudden certainties - trust the first clear reading, before the mind begins its negotiations. A fire sign under a fire Moon sees what others miss, if they stop long enough to look.
belier.mantra: I act with courage and root my fire in truth.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun sits exactly in your sign at 4° Taurus, steady and unhurried like a bull resting in morning light - this is your season, and you feel it in your bones. The First Quarter Moon blazing through Leo at 6° pushes you toward decisive action, asking you to step out from the comfortable shadow of routine and show what you are made of. No planets are retrograde today, which means the road ahead is clear: what you plant now has every chance to take root.
taureau.love: With Venus ruling your heart and the Leo Moon stirring your desire for genuine recognition, you may find yourself craving a love that is both passionate and loyal - nothing casual will satisfy you today. If you are in a relationship, say the thing you have been holding back; the stars favor honest warmth over polished silence. If you are unattached, your natural magnetism is amplified - let yourself be seen without shrinking.
taureau.work: The First Quarter Moon is a call to act on what you began two weeks ago - half-finished projects ask for your full, unhurried attention today. Taurus patience combined with Leo's drive creates a rare blend: you can push forward without burning bridges or cutting corners. Trust the plan you built with your own hands, and resist anyone who tries to rush your timeline.
taureau.energy: Your body is a reliable instrument today, steady and well-grounded under the Taurus Sun - physical tasks feel satisfying rather than draining. Spend time outdoors if you can; earth beneath your feet is not just poetry, it is medicine for your kind.
taureau.intuition: As Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'That which is below corresponds to that which is above' - and today your gut feelings about money, beauty, and security carry real weight. A quiet moment in the late afternoon, away from screens and noise, may surface an insight you have been circling for weeks.
taureau.mantra: I stand firm, I bloom fully, I deserve what I build.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazes at 6 degrees Leo, and for you, Gemini, this is a call to stop whispering and start speaking. Leo ignites the theatrical, the bold, the unafraid voice - and with no planets retrograde, every word you launch today travels forward without obstruction. Taurus holds the Sun in steady ground, offering your quicksilver mind an unusual gift: the patience to let ideas ripen before releasing them.
gemeaux.love: That bright Leo Moon pulls you toward grand gestures, the kind of declaration you usually edit before it leaves your mouth. Let one honest, unpolished thing be said today - intimacy lives in the unrevised sentence. If you are searching, go somewhere alive with sound and laughter; your spark catches fastest where others are already burning.
gemeaux.work: Mercury, your ruling planet, runs clean and unobstructed today - a rarity worth using. Draft the proposal, send the pitch, open the conversation you have been circling for weeks. The Taurus Sun rewards work that is tangible, so take at least one idea out of your head and give it a shape someone else can hold.
gemeaux.energy: The Leo-Gemini air-fire dialogue gives you a restless, crackling vitality this afternoon - use it early, before it tips into scattered overextension. Ground yourself with something physical and brief: a fast walk, a cold glass of water, ten minutes of silence between tasks.
gemeaux.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the mind is the veil and the lamp at once - today yours is more lamp than veil. A fleeting impression that visits you before noon carries more weight than it seems; write it down before Mercury's speed sweeps it past.
gemeaux.mantra: My voice is clear, my words carry light.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon, your ruling planet, stands in Leo at 6 degrees today, blazing at first quarter phase with more than half her face illuminated. She is not in her native waters with you, Cancer - she is performing, demanding to be seen. This tension between your instinct to shelter inward and the sky's pull toward visibility is precisely where today's growth lives.
cancer.love: Where you would normally retreat into familiar tenderness, the Leo Moon asks you to say the thing out loud - the feeling you have been cradling in silence. The Sun in Taurus grounds this moment beautifully, offering patience to both you and whoever receives your heart. Let warmth be spoken, not just felt.
cancer.work: With no planets retrograde, the path forward is unusually clear - no hidden reversals, no buried confusion. The Taurus Sun steadies your natural sensitivity into something practical and productive today. Choose one task you have been avoiding and bring the full weight of your focus to it; the stars are not in your way.
cancer.energy: The first quarter Moon carries the energy of effort and momentum - this is not a day for stillness but for measured movement. Your body may feel more alert than usual, almost restless; honor that signal by stepping outside or using your hands to make something tangible.
cancer.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the inner world and the outer world mirror each other perfectly - today, what surfaces emotionally is a reliable map of what is true. A hunch that arrives before noon deserves your trust, not your second-guessing.
cancer.mantra: I speak my truth and let love find its shape.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon blazes through your own sign today at 6 degrees Leo, amplifying every feeling you carry and every impression you make on the world. With the Sun rooted in steady Taurus and no planets in retrograde, the sky offers you a rare clarity - forward motion without the usual fog. The First Quarter Moon at 51.7% illumination is a hinge point, a moment where intention becomes visible action.
lion.love: Your magnetism is running high today, and people around you feel it before you even speak. If you are in a relationship, say the generous thing out loud rather than assuming your partner already knows. For those unattached, this is not a day to wait in the wings - step into the light where you can actually be seen.
lion.work: The Taurus Sun grounds your natural Leo flair in something practical and lasting, making this an excellent day to present ideas or take the lead on a stalled project. Others are watching, and not with skepticism - they are genuinely ready to be convinced. Build something today that you will still be proud of in six months.
lion.energy: Your vitality is vivid and close to the surface, like a fire that does not need coaxing. Use this physical aliveness deliberately - a long walk, a creative burst, or a workout will sharpen rather than drain you.
lion.intuition: The Moon in your sign speaks directly to the gut today, bypassing the analytical mind. As Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'That which is within is also without' - trust what stirs in your chest before you ask your head for permission.
lion.mantra: I shine fully and let others be lit by it.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazes at 6 degrees Leo, a sign that squares your Virgo nature and asks something uncomfortable of you: to be seen before you feel ready. With no planets in retrograde, the sky moves forward with unusual clarity, and Mercury, your ruling planet, cuts through the noise like a well-sharpened blade. The Sun settling into early Taurus forms an earth-to-earth harmony with you, grounding your thoughts in something real and tangible today.
vierge.love: Leo's Moon lights up the part of your chart that governs what you give freely versus what you guard carefully - and today, the tension is productive. If you have been precise where you needed to be present, a small act of warmth costs nothing but means everything. Let the people who matter to you see a little more than your polished surface.
vierge.work: Taurus and Virgo share a rare gift: the patience to build something that lasts. Today that quality is your greatest asset, especially if others around you are rushing or overcorrecting. A task that requires careful attention - revision, analysis, a detailed plan - will reward your focus with a result that genuinely satisfies.
vierge.energy: The First Quarter Moon pushes upward like a seedling through stone, and you may feel that same quiet insistence in your body today. Your vitality is steady rather than electric, best used for sustained effort rather than quick bursts - pace yourself and you will finish strong.
vierge.intuition: Heraclitus wrote that the hidden harmony is stronger than the visible one, and something hidden is speaking to you now. A detail you almost dismissed, a pattern at the edge of your perception - trust the signal, even if you cannot yet explain it in words.
vierge.mantra: I build with care what no hurry can replace.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazing through Leo at 6 degrees lights a fire beneath your naturally measured Libra temperament - this is not a day for quiet deliberation but for stepping into the open, visible and unhesitating. With the Sun rooted in Taurus, your ruling Venus finds a sympathetic earthy frequency, grounding your airy instincts into something you can actually touch and build. No planets are retrograde today, which means the current flows clean: what you begin now moves forward without hidden drag.
balance.love: Leo's Moon makes you hunger for something more than pleasant - you want to feel genuinely seen, admired, celebrated by the one you love or the one you might love. If a connection has felt polite but lukewarm, today you find the courage to raise the temperature. As Rumi wrote, 'Set your life on fire' - even in love, especially in love, tepid is the real risk.
balance.work: The Taurus Sun steadies your pen and your nerve, making this an excellent day to present ideas, negotiate, or push a stalled project back into motion. Your Libra gift for finding the elegant middle path is sharpened right now, not blunted - use it to broker something others have given up on. The clear sky above carries no planetary interference: your effort translates directly into result.
balance.energy: Leo's bold lunar light lifts your physical vitality higher than your usual graceful but moderate baseline - you may notice a restlessness, a desire to move, to be out in the world rather than behind a screen. Honor it: a walk in open air or an hour of movement you genuinely enjoy will turn that restlessness into radiance.
balance.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus taught that the inner mirrors the outer - today the unclouded sky above reflects an unusually clear inner sky within you. Trust the first impression you receive about a person or situation before your Libra mind begins its careful weighing, because that first impression is likely to be the true one.
balance.mantra: I step forward fully seen, and I belong here.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazing at 6 degrees Leo throws its light directly across your chart's axis of intimacy, Scorpio, stirring what you have kept carefully submerged. No planet retreats today - every celestial body holds its ground and moves forward, which means the universe asks the same of you. The Taurus Sun at 4 degrees anchors opposing forces: stillness and eruption, earth and depth, yours and theirs.
scorpion.love: Leo's lunar fire illuminates the stage of your partnerships, and someone may want more visibility, more warmth, more applause than you naturally offer. This is not a threat to your depth - it is an invitation to show what you feel rather than guard it. Let one true thing surface today; it will do more than a hundred calculated gestures.
scorpion.work: With no retrogrades clouding the atmosphere, decisions you make now carry real weight and real consequence - so move with intention, not impulse. Pluto's long shadow gives you the instinct to see beneath the surface of any project: use it to spot what others miss. A negotiation, a hidden opportunity, or a quiet alliance may ripen if you reach for it before the day closes.
scorpion.energy: The First Quarter Moon is a building phase, and your body knows it - there is fuel available today if you do not scatter it in too many directions. Focus your vital force on one task at a time, and you will find reserves you did not expect.
scorpion.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that what is within mirrors what is without, and today that mirror is polished clean. Trust the first reading you get of a room, a person, a silence - your Scorpionic antenna is unusually precise when the sky moves this directly.
scorpion.mantra: I surface what is true and it sets me free.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazing through Leo at 6 degrees throws a torch into your naturally wide skies, Sagittarius - fire meeting fire, ambition meeting ambition. With no planets retrograde, the celestial machinery hums forward without friction, a rare gift. The Sun settling into Taurus creates a steady gravitational pull toward the tangible, asking your restless arrow to aim at something you can actually hold.
sagittaire.love: Leo's Moon stirs your need to be seen and admired, and today that hunger is legitimate - let yourself be generous with your own radiance. In an existing relationship, grand gestures land better than quiet ones right now; think less whisper, more declaration. If you are unattached, the people drawn to you today will be drawn to your fire, not your philosophy - let yourself burn visibly.
sagittaire.work: Jupiter, your ruling planet, favors expansion, and with no cosmic drag slowing the current, a bold proposal or long-postponed pitch finds real traction today. The Taurus Sun grounds your vision in practical soil - pair your big picture with specific numbers, timelines, a concrete next step. Others are watching and they are ready to follow, but only if you show them the map.
sagittaire.energy: The double fire of Leo Moon and your own nature charges you like a lit fuse today - channel it deliberately or it burns the hand that holds it. A physical outlet, a run, a climb, a dance, will keep the voltage clean and your mind sharp.
sagittaire.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the greatest knowing comes when the inner fire is still enough to reflect. Today your intuition speaks loudest not in movement but in the half-second before you move. Trust that flash before the reasoning mind catches up.
sagittaire.mantra: I aim true, I land real, I shine without apology.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The first quarter Moon blazes at 6 degrees Leo, forming a square to your native Capricorn earth, and that friction is not punishment - it is the chisel that reveals the statue inside the stone. Saturn, your ruling lord, stands unimpeded today, no retrograde shadow to soften its demand for precision and integrity. The Sun freshly planted in Taurus feeds your element with quiet, solar nourishment, reminding you that ambition built on solid ground is ambition that lasts.
capricorne.love: Leo's Moon pulls at the stage of your heart, asking whether you allow yourself to be seen as fully as you allow yourself to be useful. In love, the risk today is not rejection but invisibility - staying so composed that the one beside you forgets you are also longing. Let one true thing show through the armor, just one, and watch how warmth answers warmth.
capricorne.work: The Sun in Taurus lights your practical instincts like a steady candle, and with no planetary retrogrades muddying the current, decisions made today carry real weight. This is a session for finishing, not starting - the half-built walls, the deferred reports, the plans you shelved when doubt crept in. Heraclitus wrote that character is destiny; today your working character is your most persuasive argument.
capricorne.energy: Your physical reserves are steady rather than electric, the kind of endurance that wins long races rather than sprint heats. Honor that tempo - push for depth of effort rather than speed, and your body will answer with reliable, sustained output.
capricorne.intuition: The Leo Moon illuminates what usually lives in shadow for you: your own need for recognition, for meaning beyond the measurable. Hermes Trismegistus taught that as within so without - the signal you are receiving today is a reflection of a question you have not yet dared to ask yourself aloud.
capricorne.mantra: I build with patience what time cannot undo.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazing at 6 degrees Leo throws a direct beam across your sky, Aquarius, and it lands squarely on the tension between your instinct to stay cool and detached and the raw, unfiltered desire to be *seen*. Leo and Aquarius are mirror signs - one roars, one observes - and today the Moon asks which side of the glass you are standing on. With no planets retrograde and the Sun settling into Taurus, the sky is unusually still and clear, a rare invitation to act without second-guessing.
verseau.love: That Leo Moon lights the house of your closest bonds with theatrical warmth, and anyone who matters to you today will feel your presence more intensely than usual - which is saying something. Let yourself be a little less reasonable in love, a little more generous with your fire; Aquarius often gives ideas when the other person was hoping for a hand to hold. One genuine, unhurried gesture carries more weight now than a perfectly reasoned declaration.
verseau.work: The Taurus Sun grounds your often stratospheric thinking into something buildable, and that is a gift you should not waste. Pick the one project that has been hovering in the abstract and push it toward a concrete first step - a draft, a number, a phone call. The stillness of a sky free from retrogrades means decisions made today are unlikely to need untangling later.
verseau.energy: Your nervous system, always running a little hotter than people realize, gets a stabilizing hand from the earthy Taurus Sun today. Lean into slow, physical rhythms - a long walk, a real meal, anything that puts you back in your body rather than your mind.
verseau.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the outer world is a reflection of the inner, and today that mirror is unusually clean. A hunch that surfaces before noon deserves to be written down rather than dismissed with logic.
verseau.mantra: I act from clarity, not from the need to be right.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The first-quarter Moon blazes at 6 degrees Leo, pulling the tides of your watery nature toward a rare shore: visibility. Pisces, you who prefer the deep to the surface, today the sky asks you to step into the light without dissolving into it. With no planets in retrograde and the Sun anchored in Taurus's fertile earth, the universe offers you unusual stillness, a held breath before a bloom.
poissons.love: Leo's Moon ignites a hunger for drama and warmth in relationships, even for someone as quietly devoted as you. If you have been loving in silence, today invites you to say it aloud, plainly, without a poem to hide behind. Those already in love may find that a small, bold gesture lands more deeply than a thousand tender hints.
poissons.work: The Taurus Sun grounds your typically fluid imagination into something you can actually build. Ideas that have drifted through your mind like smoke may suddenly feel solid enough to hold. Choose one, commit to its shape, and do the unglamorous work of writing it down, step by step.
poissons.energy: Your vitality runs higher than usual, fed by Leo's solar fire bouncing off your emotional depths. Honor it without burning through it recklessly - drink water, move your body, let yourself feel genuinely alive.
poissons.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the inner and outer worlds mirror each other exactly. Today, trust what you notice in the faces of strangers and the texture of silences - your perception is unusually accurate right now. What you sense beneath the surface is not projection; it is sight.
poissons.mantra: I shine clearly without losing myself.
poissons.author: Sibylle
